synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23315 Oracle Linux 9 nodejs:20 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23315
description:
nodejs
[1:20.19.5-1]
- Update to version 20.19.5
Resolves: RHEL-114749

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23315

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23315.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

nodejs
[1:20.19.5-1]
- Update to version 20.19.5
Resolves: RHEL-114749

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
